name: Post Autopilot
tagline: Drafts, schedules, and publishes Grok-aware threads on X.
description: Post Autopilot writes in your voice, respects your content guardrails, and posts directly via the X developer API. Ships with a tuned safety policy that blocks 19 known prompt-injection vectors out of the box.

yaml.content:
apiVersion: grokinstall.dev/v1
kind: Agent
metadata:
  id: post-autopilot
  name: Post Autopilot
spec:
  runtime: grok-4-fast
  safety:
    policy: safety-max
    blockInjection: true
  actions:
    - id: draft-thread
      uses: x.compose
    - id: schedule-post
      uses: x.schedule
      requires: [composer.approved]
  telemetry:
    sink: grokinstall-events

visuals.headline: Ship Grok-native threads at the speed of thought.
visuals.subheadline: One YAML, one tap, scheduled across X with safety-max guardrails baked in.

name: Voice Concierge
tagline: Hands-free Grok agent for replies, DMs, and quick polls.
description: A voice-first concierge for X. Wake-word activation, barge-in support, and structured command grammar for replies, DMs, and rapid polls. Built on the Voice-Ready spec v1.2.

yaml.content:
apiVersion: grokinstall.dev/v1
kind: VoiceAgent
metadata:
  id: voice-concierge
spec:
  wakeWord: "hey grok"
  language: en-US
  barge-in: true
  commands:
    - intent: reply
      grammar: "reply to <handle> saying <text>"
    - intent: dm
      grammar: "dm <handle> <text>"
    - intent: poll
      grammar: "start a poll about <topic>"

visuals.headline: Talk to X like it's 2030.
visuals.subheadline: Wake-word, barge-in, and a structured grammar for replies, DMs, and polls — no hands, no friction.

name: Swarm Sentry
tagline: A three-agent swarm that moderates replies in real time.
description: Swarm Sentry coordinates three specialist agents — Triage, Evidence, and Judge — to moderate replies on high-volume posts. Every decision is logged with citations for appeal. Runs on the Swarm-Ready v1 spec.

yaml.content:
apiVersion: grokinstall.dev/v1
kind: Swarm
metadata:
  id: swarm-sentry
spec:
  agents:
    - id: triage
      role: classifier
      runtime: grok-4-fast
    - id: evidence
      role: retriever
      runtime: grok-4
    - id: judge
      role: arbiter
      runtime: grok-4
  routing:
    - from: triage
      to: evidence
      when: "confidence < 0.85"
    - from: evidence
      to: judge
      always: true
  audit:
    log: true
    sink: grokinstall-events

name: Thread Summarizer
tagline: Collapses a 200-reply thread into a 5-bullet TL;DR.
description: Feed it any X thread URL and get a calibrated TL;DR with citations back to the original posts. Ideal for research, community management, and journalism workflows.

visuals.headline: Drop a thread URL. Get a 5-bullet TL;DR.
visuals.subheadline: Cited back to the original posts — ideal for research, community management, and newsroom triage.

name: DevRel Reply
tagline: Suggests on-brand replies for developer-community accounts.
description: Trained on DevRel voice patterns from 42 OSS accounts. Generates replies you can approve in one tap, respects a custom style guide, and flags anything your brand team pre-listed.

name: CodePilot X
tagline: Turns a code snippet into a post-ready explainer thread.
description: Paste code, pick a tone. CodePilot X writes a clear thread with inline syntax highlighting, a hook, and a CTA. Ships with VS Code sidebar integration and GitHub Action support.
